reviews.review_description: Fun concept, but earning skill points is a CHORE, taking forever for a single point. So humanoids dont give time to react and the ability to parry bullets is cool but the hitbox is its model, making it very hard to execute. Fun, sure, but i think things could have been done differently

reviews.review_title: Be very careful playing this game
reviews.review_description: I have ten times the necessary room to play this game plus I have glancing boarder turned on and somehow this game manages to walk me all the way forward into the wall d*mn  near. So be careful because of how the game plays, it will eventually FORCE you to side step obstacles and dodge projectiles okay I get it and that's part of the fun but just be careful because there is no way at all to mitigate the issue of being walked around your play area and subsequently out of bounds.

It says "Failed to connect to Server"!!
Looks like this game is officially dead, the server is offline.
Why is it still listed in the store?

Dude this should be rated mature 
i love it

I've had my VR headset for many years now and I've lost count of how many games I've played/tried. It's so hard for me to find something that doesn't cause motion sickness that isn't extremely boring. Not only does this game not cause motion sickness for me, it's ridiculously fun, and has great graphics and MOST importantly it feels super immersive. I feel as though I am inside the game. The ONLY game that has ever felt this immersive to me was the game on steam "War robots VR:The Skirmish" sadly that was a demo and I never found anything I loved as much as that game until now. Only thing is I wish when I look down instead of seeing hands inky, I wish I could see full arms with the hands and maybe even a torso to add to the immersion So thanks to the devs. I'm so happy 🥹🥹🥹💖💖💖

Oh and also, when playing it says there's a discount to unlock the full game for $4.99 but when I click purchase it shows $9.99
Cool very cool katana gun /telekenisos game
Me and my friend are competing to get a better highscore and I have been playing it so much!
For free game it’s way better than I thought it’s better than Blade Ball on Roblox VR ￼￼

Doesn't load past initial screen with game logo. Reinstalled, restarted headset and still the same result. Figured it's because full version was already released and this one was maybe deactivated. Then why would it still be available for download? Also i saw a review from 1 day ago, so apparently it's working for some.
Wanted to check this version to see if i wanna buy full game, but i guess that's not gonna happen.
how do i get the full version to work

reviews.review_title: Should be an official oculus app by now
reviews.review_description: I love this game it has to much to offer already and so much potential to grow from the different  play styles in the different wepons to the various  game modes to the discord announced tournaments that make us all come together ❤ I have tried other games but none are quit like this one it is very unique as you come to understand the more you play I would love a sitting mode added that's pretty much the only thing I could think of wanting cause from what I see they are doing a great job down the the path they are going even with customer service they are amazing and understanding to each person's  specific situation unlike some of the games I've tried to contact which would take days or sometimes no reply at all the guys or gals stay true the their customers and it shows absolutely I will have a even greater review after I try out all the different wepon styles I can not wait to see where this game goes its an exciting process and the way they carrying themselves makes me say the title for this review PS keep rocking it

Great for a small game  graphics are some of the best that I’ve seen no bugs from what I can tell it dose get kinda dry if you play it too much but the  challenges in the game help that you don’t need to spend money for anything and the weapons that you can get are really cool and creative and it’s free
￼

I think that Brisk Square is a really solid game for new vr users as it gets them past motion sickness and builds their “vr legs”. It allows them to get used to basic mechanics using the touch controllers. Overall extremely solid game with a lot of potential in the casual and competitive scene

I have played for a few days now and it' s way more fun than i expected, i have tried a few games but this was one of the more fun and enjoyable ones, the only thing that i would like to be added is more modifiers

reviews.review_title: My favorite vr game so far
reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this game. I played it for 6 hours straight trying to hit the top 10, and im sore as hell but it was a hell of a gppd time. What i love most is how immersive this game is, where most games the walking mechanics are broken and tedious as hell to use, this game totally has it figured out! I wishi could give it a 6 star review.
the game has amazing devolopers for the discord and the game is fun and very replayable its hard to get bored. of. and its in early beta. you can buy swords and how your gloves/hands look 5/5

I really like the game so far it's really fun and the community is really chill,something I find annoying is that sometimes it doesn't cut thru things but it's in early access so I understand btw SPOON

This game is fun and doesn’t stop getting fun, it’s great to chase your high score or see how far you can get competing with your friends, If you don’t have the game already, give it a try, you will probably find a new game to add to your list when your looking for a good time

i love the game the skins the gloves tye powers and everthing in this game i like. you can also move around so you can get a exercise its not the best exercise but its fun the only thing is maybe the bots could shoot faster
Stumbled on this game by chance. Really fun! Kinda hard actually. Make sure you've got a large play space or you keep getting lasers in the face and tripped up by trash cans.
